title: Project Sweep: ~/projects/myapp
summary: 2 findings across 14 files checked. No critical issues.

findings.title: Hardcoded API key reference
findings.why_it_matters: Hardcoded credentials can be exfiltrated via source control

findings.title: Unquoted variable in shell script
findings.why_it_matters: Word-splitting can cause unexpected behavior with filenames containing spaces
findings.recommended_action: Quote variable references: use "$VAR" instead of $VAR
